summary: Dark enterprise theme testing complete. All pages (Login, Dashboard, Candidates, Interviews, Contacts, Job Openings) successfully use dark theme with deep navy background (#0B1120), dark cards (#111827), cyan/teal highlights, and Manrope font. All interactions (KPI popups, vendor filter, date filters, vendor row click, drop-off click, profile dropdown, export button) working correctly. Minor fix applied to chart tooltip borders.

issues: Chart tooltip label text appears light - may need itemStyle override for better contrast. Fixed border color from #E2E8F0 to var(--border-default).

context_for_next_testing_agent: Dark enterprise theme fully implemented across all pages. CSS variables defined in index.css: --bg-base=#0B1120, --bg-card=#111827, --bg-raised=#1A2332, --text-primary=#E8ECF1, --text-secondary=#8896AB, --accent=#22D3EE. Manrope font imported and applied. All components use CSS variables for consistent theming. KPICard uses 'accent' prop for color variants (cyan/green/red/violet/amber). StatusBadge has dark-compatible status colors. All modals have dark backgrounds. Chart tooltips fixed to use dark styling.
